pricing.refundPolicy: No refunds. EOD resets $99, Static resets $349. Instant Funding has no reset option.

rules.consistencyRule: EOD/Static: 50% eval, 30% funded. Instant: 20% of total profit per day.
rules.notes: Three models: EOD (trailing EOD drawdown, monthly subscription, scaling during eval), Static (fixed drawdown, monthly subscription, no daily loss limit), Instant (trailing real-time drawdown, one-time fee, 3% daily loss, 10 min trading days for first payout). Copy trading only between own accounts — no signal services. EAs/algorithmic trading not confirmed. No resets for Instant. Fixed payout windows: 5th–8th and 20th–23rd of each month. Min withdrawal $500 (EOD/Static), $250 (Instant). Max withdrawal $3K–$5K per cycle depending on account size. 100% of first $10K profit kept, then 90% split scaling to 95% at GOAT Trader level. KYC required before first withdrawal.

markets.instruments: Futures (55 CME instruments: Equity Indices, Metals, Energy, Currency Futures, Agricultural & Soft Commodities)

notableFlags: Futures arm of Goat Funded Trader
